title: 以下、進めて。本番環境で動作するか確認せよ。 • 解決しました。Hybrid Failover の即 fail 文言は AGENTS.md で recovery matrix 前提に修正し、run- kernel-council-review.sh には実際の recovery retry を追加しました。最初の council 判定が落ちて も、1 回だけ force_copilot_continuity + gemini/xai backfill + metered override で再試行し、それ でもだめなときだけ fail します。あわせて test-shadow-continui...
summary_text: **Findings** 1. **High**: Recovery retry is triggered for *any* `ok_to_execute=false`, not only provider/lane-floor recovery failures. In [scripts/harness/run-kernel-council-review.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/run-kernel-council-review.sh) (line 404), the condition retries when `ok_to_execute` is false even if `baseline_trio_gate` is already `pass`. This can re-run and potentially overturn a legitimate substantive rejection (risk/consensus failure), which does not match recovery scope in [AGENTS.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/AGENTS.md) (lines 125-133). 2. **High**: Build/validation failures still fail immediately before recovery matrix execution. `matrix_payload="$(bash ...build-agent-matrix.sh ...)"` in [scripts/harness/run-kernel-council-review.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/run-kernel-council-review.sh) (lines 198-218) is under `set -e`; if matrix build/validation exits non-zero, the script exits without `attempt_recovery_matrix`. But lane-floor violations are enforced in [scripts/lib/validate-agent-matrix.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/lib/validate-agent-matrix.sh) (lines 48-50), and policy says recovery-first before `BLOCKED` in [AGENTS.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/AGENTS.md) (lines 96, 125-133). 3. **Medium**: Failed recovery attempts are not recorded with exact retry error in final council status. `attempt_recovery_matrix` returns failure without surfacing child retry error details (only original reason is retained) in [scripts/harness/run-kernel-council-review.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/run-kernel-council-review.sh) (lines 150-188, 337-345, 405-409). This is weaker than the “record each failed recovery attempt with exact error” requirement in [AGENTS.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/AGENTS.md) (line 131). 4. **Medium (test gap)**: Current tests do not cover the two regressions above. [tests/test-kernel-council-review.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-kernel-council-review.sh) (lines 219-223) covers pass/recovery/fail/crash at aggregate stage, but has no case for: - `baseline_trio_gate=pass` with `ok_to_execute=false` (should not recovery-retry unless policy explicitly allows it), - pre-aggregate matrix build/validation failure path (currently immediate fail). Assumption: I interpreted AGENTS recovery-first scope as provider/lane-floor recovery only, not general vote rejection recovery.
